name: Sensually Seductive Kiss
descrip: Sweetly make out. Can charm, has a high crit chance, and is a foreplay skill.
outcome: [AttackerName] lovingly makes out with [TargetName], slowly entangling with [TargetHisOrHer] tongue while seductively gazing into [TargetHimOrHer] eyes.
miss: [AttackerName] lovingly makes out with [TargetName], slowly entangling with [TargetHisOrHer] tongue while seductively gazing into [TargetHimOrHer] eyes, but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind fogs up from the intimacy! [TargetName] is charmed!
